[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Laytron''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an officer in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the height of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Biography==
During the early stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Laytron, serving in the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], was dispatched to [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]] as the backup to the primary mission of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Roshton]] during the [[Attack on Cartao|battle]]. Laytron's forces were in place in the event of a disaster, as the evacuation force for Roshton's troopers. [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]] provided Lieutenant Laytron's location to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jafer Torles]] and [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Pilester Binalie]] after [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces tried to take control of [[Foulahn City]] and [[Spaarti Creations]], hoping to bring Laytron's forces to bear in a mission to free Roshton. Laytron was a by-the-book officer, and initially refused Torles' request for assistance. When Binalie revealed the existence of a fourth Outlink on the grounds of Spaarti Creations, Laytron decided that there was a good chance of success.<ref name="HoC" />
